description: Style NoteLaunched in 2011, dunhill's Custom fragrance for men is bottled in a glassy flacon in a deep chocolate liqueur colour. You can even order a customized monogram on the metal cap, from the brand's official website!Product DetailsThe top note is the English Pippin apples with heart note of spicy black pepper. The base consists of notes of cedar wood and incense.CautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSize100 ml
